summary: Frontend-only testing of POS WhatsApp application. Vite build completes successfully with no module import errors. Login page renders without JS console errors. All critical fixes verified: useCreateStandalonePromo is properly exported from useQueries.ts and imported in PromoManagementPage.tsx, no BigInt/0n usage remains in components, no wrong import paths found.

integration_issues.issue: CORS error when connecting to external WordPress backend (erpos.tekrabyte.id) - this is expected since we're testing from preview domain

critical_code_review_comments: TypeScript type errors exist in CashflowPage.tsx regarding transaction types (timestamp, paymentMethods, items properties)
Avatar component props issues in CustomerList.tsx, SettingsView.tsx, Sidebar.tsx
Missing module imports in src/components/admin/kiosk/ subfolder and src/components/admin/hooks/useQueries.ts
These are pre-existing issues, not related to the main fixes
test_credentials: No credentials available - WordPress backend requires valid credentials
context_for_next_testing_agent: The app connects to external WordPress backend at https://erpos.tekrabyte.id/wp-json/posq/v1. Login requires valid WordPress credentials. The main fixes (useCreateStandalonePromo hook export, BigInt removal, import path corrections) have been verified through: 1) Successful Vite production build 2) ESLint passing on all admin components 3) Grep verification of exports/imports. TypeScript compilation shows pre-existing type errors not related to the fixes.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - testing only, no bugs found related to the fixes

verification_results.useCreateStandalonePromo_export: VERIFIED - exported at line 738 in useQueries.ts, imported correctly in PromoManagementPage.tsx
verification_results.bigint_0n_removal: VERIFIED - no BigInt or 0n literals found in POSPage.tsx, KioskPage.tsx, CustomerManagementPage.tsx
verification_results.wrong_imports_fixed: VERIFIED - no imports from '../../backend' or bare '../types' path found
verification_results.vite_build: PASSED - build completed successfully with no errors
verification_results.login_page_render: PASSED - renders without JS console errors
verification_results.eslint_checks: PASSED - all admin components pass ESLint
